info.title: DryGen
info.description:
Copyright 2022-2024 Eirik Bjornset
csharp-from-json-schema                              Generate C# classes from a json schema, using
[NJsonSchema](https://github.com/RicoSuter/NJ
sonSchema).
mermaid-c4component-diagram-from-dotnet-deps-json    Generate a Mermaid C4 Component diagram from
a .Net deps.json file.
mermaid-class-diagram-from-csharp                    Generate a Mermaid Class diagram from a C#
assembly using reflection.
mermaid-class-diagram-from-json-schema               Generate a Mermaid Class diagram from a json
schema.
mermaid-er-diagram-from-csharp                       Generate a Mermaid Entity Relationship
diagram from a C# assembly using reflection.
mermaid-er-diagram-from-efcore                       Generate a Mermaid Entity Relationship
diagram from a C# assembly using Entity
Framework Core.
mermaid-er-diagram-from-json-schema                  Generate a Mermaid Entity Relationship
diagram from a Json shcema.
options-from-commandline                             Generate dry-gen options for a verb from the
command line.
verbs-from-options-file                              Execute several verbs in one run. You specify
each verb in a separate yaml document in the
--options-file. The yaml documents should be
separated by --- (three hyphes) on its own
line in the file.
